name: Velocity Run Pro
description: Lightweight running shoes designed for daily road running with breathable mesh, cushioned midsole, and anti-slip outsole.
specifications: Weight: 240g; Drop: 8mm; Material: engineered mesh; Sole: rubber grip; Use: road running
reviews: Very comfortable for 10k runs and good value for money.

name: TrailFlex X2
description: Trail running shoes with aggressive lugs, ankle support, and water-resistant upper for rugged terrain.
specifications: Weight: 290g; Drop: 6mm; Material: ripstop upper; Sole: deep lug outsole
reviews: Excellent grip on wet surfaces but a little firm for long road runs.

name: CloudStep Everyday
description: Cushioned sneakers built for all-day comfort, ideal for walking, commuting, and light workouts.
specifications: Weight: 260g; Foam: soft EVA; Upper: knit; Insole: memory foam
reviews: Great comfort for long office days and casual walking.

name: SprintLite Elite
description: Performance running shoes for speed sessions with responsive foam and stable heel lock.
specifications: Weight: 220g; Plate: nylon blend; Upper: woven mesh; Use: tempo and race
reviews: Very responsive for intervals; snug fit in toe box.

name: UrbanStride Slip-On
description: Slip-on comfort shoes with stretch knit upper and supportive arch for daily wear.
specifications: Weight: 230g; Arch support: medium; Upper: stretch knit; Sole: EVA
reviews: Easy to wear and surprisingly cushioned for daily errands.

name: FitPulse Smartwatch S3
description: Fitness smartwatch with heart rate, sleep tracking, and multi-sport modes.
specifications: Display: AMOLED; Battery: 7 days; Sensors: HR, SpO2, GPS
reviews: Accurate tracking and battery lasts nearly a week.

name: HydraSip Steel Bottle
description: Insulated steel bottle keeps liquids cold for 24 hours and hot for 12 hours.
specifications: Capacity: 750ml; Material: stainless steel; Lid: leak-proof
reviews: Solid build quality and no leakage in gym bag.

name: CoreMax Yoga Mat
description: Non-slip yoga mat with extra cushioning for floor workouts and stretching.
reviews: Soft and grippy, ideal for home workouts.

name: EnduroCushion 5
description: Long-distance running shoes with plush cushioning and wide forefoot comfort.
specifications: Weight: 275g; Cushion: high; Fit: regular to wide; Use: long runs
reviews: Excellent for half marathon training and recovery runs.

name: BudgetRun Starter
description: Entry-level running shoes for beginners with decent cushioning and durable outsole.
specifications: Weight: 300g; Cushion: medium; Upper: mesh; Use: beginner running
reviews: Affordable and comfortable for new runners.
